title: Spike: Review Metrics Dictionary Document for MVP Scoping
description:
Research spike to review the Metrics Dictionary design document and identify areas needing refined definitions and clearer explanations of features, data model, and user experience.

## Objective

Review the [First Sprint in Phase 2 — Metrics Dictionary](https://goodmangroup.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/MB/pages/53837988/FirstSprintinPhase2-MetricsDictionary) Confluence page and add inline comments wherever definitions, feature descriptions, or data model explanations need clarification.

## Outcome

A follow-up meeting to walk through the comments and determine whether a basic MVP of the Metrics Dictionary can be scoped from the existing document.
acceptance_criteria: Metrics Dictionary document has been reviewed with inline comments added
Comments identify areas where feature definitions need refinement
Comments identify areas where data model explanations need clarification
Comments identify areas where user experience descriptions need improvement
A follow-up meeting is scheduled to discuss findings and MVP feasibility
